title: git kura seal — session file
description: Schema for session files written to <git-common-dir>/kura/sessions/*.json by `git kura seal enter`. One file per worktree; files may persist as stale records after abnormal exit and must be removed manually.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version of this session record.

key.description: The seal key active in this session.

worktree.description: Absolute path to the git worktree root this session is locked to.

parent_pid.description: PID of the `git kura seal enter` process that holds this session.

child_pid.description: PID of the child shell or command. 0 while the child has not yet been started.

started_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the session was acquired.
